info.title: Pangolin Integration API
info.description: Authentication: Set the PANGOLIN_TOKEN environment variable to your integration token. Base URL: most Pangolin Enterprise Edition deployments mount the integration API at /api/v1 under the dashboard host (e.g. https://<your-dashboard>/api/v1) — set PANGOLIN_BASE_URL accordingly.

Bearer Auth.description: Pangolin integration API token. Create one in the dashboard under Integration Tokens.

get.description: Get a certificate by domain.

post.description: Restart a certificate by ID.

post.description: Update a resource.

schema.description: Filter resources based on enabled status

parameters.description: Filter resources based on enabled status
parameters.name: enabled

schema.description: Filter resources based on authentication state. `protected` means the resource has at least one auth mechanism (password, pincode, header auth, SSO, or email whitelist). `not_protected` means the resource has no auth mechanisms. `none` means the resource is not protected by HTTP (i.e. it has no auth mechanisms and http is false).

parameters.description: Filter resources based on authentication state. `protected` means the resource has at least one auth mechanism (password, pincode, header auth, SSO, or email whitelist). `not_protected` means the resource has no auth mechanisms. `none` means the resource is not protected by HTTP (i.e. it has no auth mechanisms and http is false).
parameters.name: authState

schema.description: Filter resources based on health status of their targets. `healthy` means all targets are healthy. `degraded` means at least one target is unhealthy, but not all are unhealthy. `offline` means all targets are unhealthy. `unknown` means all targets have unknown health status.

parameters.description: Filter resources based on health status of their targets. `healthy` means all targets are healthy. `degraded` means at least one target is unhealthy, but not all are unhealthy. `offline` means all targets are unhealthy. `unknown` means all targets have unknown health status.
parameters.name: healthStatus

schema.description: When set, only resources that have at least one target on this site are returned

parameters.description: When set, only resources that have at least one target on this site are returned
parameters.name: siteId

get.description: Get a user in an organization by username. When idpId is not passed, only internal users are searched (username is globally unique for them). For external (OIDC) users, pass idpId to search by username within that identity provider.

schema.description: Filter by client status. Can be a comma-separated list of values. Defaults to 'active'.

schema.description: Filter by agent type. Use 'unknown' to filter clients with no agent detected.

parameters.description: Filter by agent type. Use 'unknown' to filter clients with no agent detected.
parameters.name: agent

schema.description: Filter by device status. Can include multiple values separated by commas. 'active' means not archived, not blocked, and if approval is enabled, approved. 'pending' and 'denied' are only applicable if approval is enabled.

parameters.description: Filter by device status. Can include multiple values separated by commas. 'active' means not archived, not blocked, and if approval is enabled, approved. 'pending' and 'denied' are only applicable if approval is enabled.
parameters.name: status
